name: KeepinCRM Sync for OpenCart
description: Order sync to KeepinCRM for OpenCart 4.x — pushes each order as an agreement (POST /agreements, X-Auth-Token) on placement or status change. Idempotent (no duplicate agreements via a unique sync journal), retry queue via cron, product/payment/shipping mapping, optional funnel/stage/source/responsible routing, encrypted API token, connection test, and a sync journal with request/response log.
author: CatCode
